data.friendly_name_room_name_at_begin: Set Room Name at begin of name

data_description.cover_position_mode:
Choose how to handle cover positions:
- 'auto': uses time-based tracking if no sensor, otherwise native
- 'native': uses only webserver feedback
- 'time_based': always forces time-based tracking
- 'legacy': original master branch behavior (no tracking)

data.delete_and_reload_all_entities: Delete and reload all entities (if naming changed)

set_travel_times.name: Set Cover Travel Times
set_travel_times.description: Set the opening and closing times for a cover. Values are permanently saved and used for position tracking.

travel_time_up.name: Opening Time (seconds)
travel_time_up.description: Time in seconds required to fully open the cover

travel_time_down.name: Closing Time (seconds)
travel_time_down.description: Time in seconds required to fully close the cover
